allow: PowerShell($h = Get-Clipboard -TextFormatType Html -Raw; if \($h\) { $p = "C:\\Users\\ansaj\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\c--Users-ansaj-Downloads-files\\7ed6605a-831b-4413-be55-a2bc28db19db\\scratchpad\\clip.html"; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($p, $h, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); "saved html, length=" + $h.Length } else { "no html format on clipboard" })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $obj = [System.Windows.Forms.Clipboard]::GetDataObject\(\); $ms = $obj.GetData\("HTML Format", $false\); $p = "C:\\Users\\ansaj\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\c--Users-ansaj-Downloads-files\\7ed6605a-831b-4413-be55-a2bc28db19db\\scratchpad\\clip-raw.html"; if \($ms -is [System.IO.MemoryStream]\) { [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($p, $ms.ToArray\(\)\); "raw bytes saved: " + $ms.Length } elseif \($ms -is [string]\) { [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($p, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($ms\)\); "string saved as utf8: " + $ms.Length } else { "type: " + $ms.GetType\(\).FullName })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $s = [System.Windows.Forms.Clipboard]::GetDataObject\(\).GetData\("HTML Format", $false\); $fixed = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\([System.Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding\(1252\).GetBytes\($s\)\); $p = "C:\\Users\\ansaj\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\c--Users-ansaj-Downloads-files\\7ed6605a-831b-4413-be55-a2bc28db19db\\scratchpad\\clip-raw.html"; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($p, $fixed, \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\)\)\); if \($fixed.Contains\([char]0x0627\)\) { "OK - real Arabic recovered" } else { "still mojibake" })
